top_signals.title: Trump pledges ‘final determination’ on Iran deal to extend ceasefire
top_signals.summary: US president seeks agreement on ‘unrestricted traffic’ in Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Zijin faces delays to its $4bn swoop for Allied Gold
top_signals.summary: Allied’s biggest mine is in Mali, which has arrested a number of foreign executives in recent years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Investors race to get exposure to SpaceX ahead of IPO
top_signals.summary: Net $14bn pours into funds with stakes in rocket company while ETF providers line up wave of new products
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: AI-Driven Port Security: Innovations Transforming Maritime Operations
top_signals.summary: The increasing automation around port and cargo operations sees greater use of remotely tracked and operated sensors and camera systems to deliver operational efficiency, security and greater safety across the huge footprint of any modern port.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
